hero.subcopy: Curated luxury pieces awaiting their next chapter. Authenticated. Certified. From Tokyo.

philosophy.headline: From Japan to the World, Delivering Authenticity.
philosophy.authentic_desc: Verified by expert staff, one by one. Every item guaranteed genuine.
philosophy.curated_desc: Only the finest condition items make it to our shelves.

philosophy.ceo_message: Our commitment is to deliver only authentic items. Every product comes with an Authenticity Guarantee — 100% refund if ever found inauthentic. We serve customers worldwide with trust, transparency, and care.

authenticity.label: WHY TRUST US
authenticity.headline: Guaranteed Authentic, Every Time.
authenticity.entrupy_desc: Every item is verified using Entrupy's AI-powered authentication system. Each product receives a unique certificate with a verifiable link.
authenticity.guarantee_desc: If any item is found to be inauthentic, we provide a full refund — no questions asked. Your trust is our top priority.
authenticity.expert_desc: Our trained specialists inspect every item individually before it reaches our shelves. Only products meeting our strict standards are approved.
authenticity.cert_desc: Each product comes with an Entrupy authentication certificate featuring a unique verification link. Customers can verify authenticity anytime, anywhere.

reviews.label: CUSTOMER REVIEWS
reviews.headline: Google Reviews
reviews.review1: Outstanding quality. Everything is authentic and I felt safe purchasing. International shipping was fast too.
reviews.review2: The best vintage luxury shop in Tokyo. Staff is very professional, and the Entrupy certificate gives extra peace of mind.
reviews.review3: Purchased a CHANEL bag. Excellent condition with authenticity certificate. Very satisfied and will shop again.
reviews.review4: Ordered from overseas and received it quickly via DHL. Beautiful packaging and perfect product quality.

greeting.label: MESSAGE FROM THE CEO
greeting.headline: Greeting
greeting.name: Tominaga Asaki
greeting.title:
T-Family Inc.
Representative Director
greeting.message:
I am Tominaga Asaki, Representative Director of T-Family Inc.

Our company was founded in 2020 with one unwavering belief: to deliver only authentic items. Every product comes with Entrupy AI authentication and a full authenticity guarantee — if any item is ever found to be inauthentic, we provide a complete refund.

Through our physical store in Nishi-Shinbashi, Tokyo, and our online shop, we serve customers worldwide with trust, transparency, and care.

We cherish every connection with our customers and will continue to deliver genuine value to the world.

b2b.label: FOR BUYERS & DEALERS
b2b.headline: Partnership
b2b.subcopy: We supply authenticated luxury goods to dealers and buyers worldwide. Competitive wholesale pricing with full authenticity guarantee.
b2b.feature1_desc: Every product has been verified for authenticity. Full refund guarantee if any item is found inauthentic.
b2b.feature2_desc: Market-driven pricing on high-demand brands popular in international markets.
b2b.feature3_desc: International shipping via DHL with invoice and export documentation support.
b2b.feature4_desc: Support for cross-border e-commerce and live selling inventory sourcing consultations.
